FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class PngWriter

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

Minimal pure-managed PNG encoder for debug frame captures — no WIC / System.Drawing, AOT-safe, zero new deps. Emits an opaque RGB PNG (color type 2) from a tightly-packed top-down BGRA8 buffer (the D3D12 readback format). Used only by the --screenshot tooling path; never on the hot frame path.

public static class PngWriter

object
PngWriter

object.ToString()

Methods

WriteBgra(string, ReadOnlySpan<byte>, int, int)

Write a tightly-packed, top-down BGRA8 buffer (stride = width*4) as an opaque RGB PNG at path.

public static void WriteBgra(string path, ReadOnlySpan<byte> bgra, int width, int height)

Parameters

path string
bgra ReadOnlySpan<byte>
width int
height int
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
